The time of rising of Agastya-Canopus—for each country
should be determined by calculation and announced by an astro-
nomer. Now, for Ujjain, it takes place when the Sun's true posi-
tion is 7° short of Sign Virgo (Kanya).
[Colebrook comments on this verse and quotes XIV 39, 40
from the Paficasiddhantika *•
